chunks.title: Josiah's Early Reign and Reform
chunks.reason: Describes Josiah's youth, his spiritual seeking, and the initial cleansing of Judah and Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Repairing the Temple
chunks.reason: Details the collection of funds and the faithful execution of repairs on the house of Yahweh.

chunks.title: Discovery of the Book of Law
chunks.reason: Narrates Hilkiah finding the law book and King Josiah's reaction to hearing its words.

chunks.title: Huldah's Prophecy
chunks.reason: Contains the prophetess Huldah's message from Yahweh regarding judgment on the land and peace for the king.

chunks.title: Covenant Renewal and Final Reform
chunks.reason: Describes the gathering of the people, the reading of the law, the covenant renewal, and the final removal of idols.
